tasks.title: CompactionManager Instance-Based Design
tasks.description: Restructure CompactionManager to use instance-based design instead of static methods. Store CompactionConfig in struct instance and update StorageService to store Option<CompactionManager>.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify CompactionManager::new(config) constructs with stored config
AddUnitTest: verify should_auto_compact() uses stored config instance
AddUnitTest: verify compact() uses stored config instance
AddUnitTest: verify StorageService stores Option<CompactionManager> instead of static methods
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing compaction behavior preserved after refactor
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-storage
tasks.impl_notes: Extract static methods into instance methods. Add new() constructor that takes CompactionConfig. Update StorageService to hold Option<CompactionManager> field.

tasks.title: Add compact_session to StorageService
tasks.description: Add compact_session(id: &str) -> Result<CompactionResult, StorageError> method to StorageService that delegates to CompactionManager::compact().
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify compact_session returns Ok(CompactionResult) for existing session
AddUnitTest: verify compact_session returns NotFound error for non-existent session
AddIntegrationTest: verify compact_session delegates correctly to CompactionManager::compact
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error propagation for invalid session IDs
tasks.impl_notes: Method should call self.compaction_manager.as_ref().and_then(|cm| cm.compact(session)). Return StorageError::NotFound if session doesn't exist.

tasks.title: Add load_project(id) Method
tasks.description: Add load_project(id: &str) -> Result<Option<ProjectModel>, StorageError> method to StorageService. Returns Some(ProjectModel) if found, None if not found.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify load_project returns Some(ProjectModel) for existing project UUID
AddUnitTest: verify load_project returns None for non-existent project UUID
AddUnitTest: verify load_project handles UUID string format correctly
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for malformed UUID strings
tasks.impl_notes: Parse id as UUID, query repository for project. Return Ok(None) if not found, Ok(Some(model)) if found.

tasks.title: Add exists() to SessionRepository
tasks.description: Add exists(&self, id: &str) -> Result<bool, StorageError> method to SessionRepository trait and implement for SqliteSessionRepository and InMemorySessionRepository.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify SqliteSessionRepository::exists returns true for existing session
AddUnitTest: verify SqliteSessionRepository::exists returns false for non-existent session
AddUnitTest: verify InMemorySessionRepository::exists returns true for existing session
AddUnitTest: verify InMemorySessionRepository::exists returns false for non-existent session
AddRegressionTest: ensure exists() does not interfere with other repository operations
tasks.impl_notes: Add method to SessionRepository trait. Sqlite implementation: SELECT EXISTS(...). InMemory implementation: self.sessions.contains_key(id).

tasks.title: Add recover_session to StorageService
tasks.description: Add recover_session(id: &str) -> Result<Session, StorageError> method to StorageService that delegates to CrashRecovery::restore().
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify recover_session returns Ok(Session) for recoverable session
AddUnitTest: verify recover_session returns NotFound error for non-existent session
AddIntegrationTest: verify recover_session delegates to CrashRecovery::restore correctly
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for corrupted session data
tasks.impl_notes: Method should call CrashRecovery::restore() with the session id. Return StorageError::NotFound if session doesn't exist.

tasks.title: Pagination Verification
tasks.description: Verify that list_sessions(limit, offset) and list_projects(limit, offset) work correctly. Empty results should return empty vector, not error.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify list_sessions returns correct items within limit/offset range
AddUnitTest: verify list_sessions returns empty Vec when no sessions exist
AddUnitTest: verify list_projects returns correct items within limit/offset range
AddUnitTest: verify list_projects returns empty Vec when no projects exist
AddIntegrationTest: verify pagination consistency across multiple calls
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify handling of invalid limit/offset values
tasks.impl_notes: Ensure pagination queries use LIMIT and OFFSET correctly in SQL. Return empty Vec (not error) when no results found.

tasks.title: Add Migration Error Variant
tasks.description: Add StorageError::Migration(String) variant to error.rs for handling database migration errors.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify StorageError::Migration formats error message correctly
AddUnitTest: verify Migration variant implements std::error::Error
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify Migration errors propagate correctly through Service/Repository layers
tasks.impl_notes: Add #[error("Migration error: {0}")] variant to StorageError enum.

tasks.title: Add SessionLocked Error Variant
tasks.description: Add StorageError::SessionLocked(String) variant to error.rs for handling session lock errors.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify StorageError::SessionLocked formats error message correctly
AddUnitTest: verify SessionLocked variant implements std::error::Error
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify SessionLocked errors are returned when session is locked
tasks.impl_notes: Add #[error("Session locked: {0}")] variant to StorageError enum.

tasks.title: Add Recovery Error Variant
tasks.description: Add StorageError::Recovery(String) variant to error.rs for handling crash recovery errors.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify StorageError::Recovery formats error message correctly
AddUnitTest: verify Recovery variant implements std::error::Error
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify Recovery errors propagate correctly from CrashRecovery
tasks.impl_notes: Add #[error("Recovery error: {0}")] variant to StorageError enum.

tasks.title: Add list_incomplete_sessions
tasks.description: Add list_incomplete_sessions() -> Result<Vec<Uuid>, StorageError> method to StorageService that returns Vec of incomplete session IDs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify list_incomplete_sessions returns Vec of incomplete session UUIDs
AddUnitTest: verify list_incomplete_sessions returns empty Vec when no incomplete sessions exist
AddIntegrationTest: verify incomplete sessions are correctly identified from session state
RunTestSuite: execute all related tests
tasks.impl_notes: Query repository for sessions where is_complete = false. Return Uuid list.

tasks.title: Implement list_by_project
tasks.description: Add list_by_project(project_path: &str) method to SessionRepository trait and implementations to filter sessions by project.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify SqliteSessionRepository::list_by_project returns only sessions for given project
AddUnitTest: verify InMemorySessionRepository::list_by_project returns only sessions for given project
AddUnitTest: verify list_by_project returns empty Vec for project with no sessions (not error)
AddUnitTest: verify list_by_project correctly filters by project_path string
AddRegressionTest: ensure list_by_project does not affect other repository operations
tasks.impl_notes: Add method to SessionRepository trait. Sqlite: WHERE project_path = ?. InMemory: filter sessions HashMap by project_path field.
